MCN-LSTM (Sensors 2023).reference: PMC10610887 — Real-Time Anomaly Detection for Water Quality Sensor Monitoring, Sensors 2023
MCN-LSTM (Sensors 2023).note: Reimplementation on USGS 5-param data; published F1=0.93 on 3-param Madison River

aquassm_v2_holdout.training: Self-supervised MPP on 78575 real USGS sequences (241 sites)

results.reference: PMC10515950 — Deep Autoencoder for Zebrafish Behavioral Anomaly, PLOS CompBio 2024
results.note: Our reimpl. on 28,610 ECOTOX trajectories (10× larger dataset)
BiLSTM encoder → bottleneck(32) → LSTM decoder, trained normal-only

biomotion_v2_holdout.data_source: REAL EPA ECOTOX behavioral data only (no synthetic)

HydroViT_v6.note: evaluated on v5 test split (same seed=42)

DenseNet121 (HydroVision-style).reference: arXiv 2509.01882 — HydroVision: Predicting Optically Active Parameters, Sep 2025
DenseNet121 (HydroVision-style).note: ImageNet pretrained, first conv adapted 3→10 channels

ResNet50 (ImageNet pretrained).note: ImageNet pretrained, first conv adapted 3→10 channels

key_changes_vs_v8: CNN-ViT hybrid: 3-layer stride-1 CNN (10→32→64→128ch) before ViT
CNNToViTAdapter: fuses raw spectral + CNN features into 13ch ViT input
MultiScaleCNNAggregator: pools all 3 CNN feature maps into 256-dim
DeepWQHeadV2: dual-stream (ViT 256 + CNN 256) with 3 residual blocks
Weighted loss: chl_a=3x, water_temp=3x, turbidity=2x, phycocyanin=2x
120 epochs fine-tune (vs 80 in v8) with cosine annealing
Best model saved by mean R² across all params (not just water_temp)

microbiomenet_benchmark.fairness_note: FIXED: All models evaluated on the SAME EMP-only test split. Previous benchmark compared MicroBiomeNet on EMP-only (n=3038) vs baselines on consolidated (n=12347) — that was wrong.

microbiomenet_v3_holdout.split_description: Strict spatial holdout using sentinel.data.splits. Sites assigned to folds via SHA-256 hash of site_id. Folds 0,1,2 -> train, Fold 3 -> val, Fold 4 -> test. Zero site leakage verified.
microbiomenet_v3_holdout.data_source: Real EMP 16S rRNA only (no synthetic data)

predictability_audit.description: Per-target learnability from cheap scalar sensors (temp + conductivity). Baseline A = scalar MLP; Baseline B = physics-only.

verdicts.INPUT: This column is one of the two scalar inputs — identity check
verdicts.WEAK: R² 0.10–0.30 — needs vision or targeted sampling

SimpleMLP_v2_same_split.note: Trained on same expanded dataset and test split as ToxiGene v2
